candidate_definition_hints.text: An extensive node suite that enables ComfyUI to process 3D inputs (Mesh & UV Texture, etc) using cutting edge algorithms (3DGS, NeRF, etc.)
**Make 3D assets generation in ComfyUI good and convenient as it generates image/video!**
